message:
🌱 atlantis: Terraform log streaming for custom workflows (#1059)

* 🌱 Add atlantis: Terraform log streaming for custom workflows mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct PR link for atlantis#2054 to PR#2261

PR #1937 introduced base streaming but excluded custom workflows.
PR #2261 'feat: stream output for custom workflows' explicitly fixes #2054.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "atlantis-2054-terraform-log-streaming-for-custom-workflows",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "atlantis: Terraform log streaming for custom workflows",
+    "description": "Terraform log streaming for custom workflows. Requested by 38+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current atlantis deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your atlantis version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nhelm list -n atlantis 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working atlantis installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review atlantis configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis\n```\n#1937 introduced log streaming of TF commands. The PR states that custom workflows were considered out of scope."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Terraform log streaming for custom workflows",
+        "description": "This feature allows users to view their terraform logs in real time when running atlantis plan/apply commands.  This implementation uses websockets to stream the logs from the terraform client to the user's web browser. \n\n### How to use it? \n\n- Comment atlantis plan/apply command on any PR as usual. \n- The github status checks will update with links to the log-streaming UI for every workspace for every project in the PR. If a workspace is not set, it defaults to a default workspace. \n- Click on\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Terraform log streaming for custom workflows\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This feature allows users to view their terraform logs in real time when running atlantis plan/apply commands.  This implementation uses websockets to stream the logs from the terraform client to the user's web browser. \n\n### How to use it? \n\n- Comment atlantis plan/apply command on any PR as usual.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
